texto: Outwardly I was all confidence and openness
autor: inwardly I was spiteful and lonely and unaware of how to relate to the world. I wanted so much to be good but only knew how to appear that way by being bad.
explicacao: Citação de inwardly I was spiteful and lonely and unaware of how to relate to the world. I wanted so much to be good but only knew how to appear that way by being bad. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Outwardly I was all confidence and openness” articula reflexao, m-e-thomas, outwardly em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
